query_normalized: predicting the elastic moduli of 2d materials from first-principles calculations materials science
rationale: This paper focuses on electronic properties (Fermi level, band structure, Schottky barriers) and metal-semiconductor contact behavior in 2D materials, not on predicting elastic moduli. While it uses first-principles calculations on 2D materials (SnO), the mechanical analysis (out-of-plane compression) is only to assess contact performance under deformation, not to measure or predict elastic moduli as the user's question requires.
